svg.title: Mermaid actor boxes
svg.desc: Demonstrates Mermaid participant boxes mapped onto sequencer actor groups, including adjacent different-colour boxes and a repeated Data tier box ending on Audit. From the project root, regenerate this Mermaid transform and SVG with: node sequencer.js --mermaid -i test/mermaid-features/19-box-actor-groups/input.mmd -o -f -t test/mermaid-features/19-box-actor-groups
svg.text: Demonstrates Mermaid participant boxes mapped onto sequencer actor groups, including adjacent different-colour boxes and a repeated Data tier box ending on Audit.
